title: eora baueri
intro: Eora baueri, also known as the Tasmanian blue gum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the island of Tasmania in Australia and has been used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and wounds. Eora baueri can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or infusion for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
